zh.Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England: 英國可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Grenville於大約1380年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親Sir Theobald Grenville II14歲，母親Margaret Courtenay the younger34歲。他於1403年與Thomasine Cole在英國可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓結婚。他去世於大約1449年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾享年71歲，埋葬在英國戴文比德福德。

zh-hans.Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England: 英国可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Grenville于大约1380年出生在英国可瓦爾时，他的父亲Sir Theobald Grenville II14岁，母亲Margaret Courtenay the younger34岁。他于1403年与Thomasine Cole在英国可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓结婚。他去世于大约1449年在英国英格兰可瓦爾享年71岁，埋葬在英国戴文比德福德。

nameMeanings.name: Grenville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Grainville-la-Teinturière in Seine-Maritime, France.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Grenville was born about 1380, in Cornwall, England, his father, Sir Theobald Grenville II, was 14 and his mother, Margaret Courtenay the younger, was 34. He married Thomasine Cole in 1403, in Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England. He died about 1449, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Bideford, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Grenville est né environ 1380, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir Theobald Grenville II, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Margaret Courtenay the younger, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Thomasine Cole en 1403, à Kilkhampton, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Il est décédé environ 1449, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Bideford, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Grenville um 1380 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Theobald Grenville II 14 und seine Mutter Margaret Courtenay the younger 34. Er hat 1403 in Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England Thomasine Cole geheiratet. Er starb um 1449 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bideford, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Grenville è nato il circa 1380 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Sir Theobald Grenville II, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Courtenay the younger, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Thomasine Cole nel 1403, nel Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England. Morì circa 1449, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Bideford, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Grenvilleが約1380年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Sir Theobald Grenville IIは14歳，母Margaret Courtenay the youngerは34歳であった。1403年にイギリスコルンワルキルクハンプトンでThomasine Coleと結婚した。彼は約1449年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで71歳で死去し，イギリスデボンビデフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Grenville(이)가 대략 1380년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Theobald Grenville II(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Courtenay the younger(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1403년 영국 코른월 킬카프턴에서 Thomasine Cole(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 대략 1449년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 비데퍼드에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1380–Abt 1449: tany ho any amin'ny 1380–tany ho any amin'ny 1449

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Grenville nasceu aproximadamente 1380, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Theobald Grenville II, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Courtenay the younger, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Thomasine Cole em 1403, em Kilkhampton, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1449, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Grenville родился около 1380 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Theobald Grenville II было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Courtenay the younger, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Thomasine Cole в 1403 г. в местности килхамптон, корнвалл, Англия. Он умер около 1449 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности бидефорд, девон, Англия.

sm.about 1380–Abt 1449: e tusa o le 1380–e tusa o le 1449

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Grenville nació aproximadamente 1380, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Theobald Grenville II, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Margaret Courtenay the younger, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Thomasine Cole en 1403, en Kilkhampton, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Murió aproximadamente 1449, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra.
